ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Prepend this text before each caption.
ast.target: 在每条说明前添加此文本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 为说明自定义 CSS 样式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Identify the caption by surrounding it with the delimeter. Start and end delimeters mays be specified by separation with a comma (,).
ast.target: 通过用 delimeter 包围来识别说明。起始和结束 delimeter 可用逗号 (,) 分隔指定。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 将说明文本作为 HTML 插入。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: If no delimeter is provided the entire alt text is taken to be the caption. If a single delimeter is specified it must indicate the start and end of the caption. If two delimeters are specified, by separation with a comma, the caption is taken to be the text between the start and end delimeters.
ast.target: 如果未提供 delimeter，则整个 alt 文本将作为说明。如果指定单个 delimeter，它必须表示说明的开始和结束。如果指定两个 delimeter，并用逗号分隔，则说明为起始和结束 delimeter 之间的文本。
